summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Multi-Restaurant (Multi-Tenant) Architecture. All 16 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Owner dashboard with RestaurantsPage, Admin creation with expiration dates, Settings page, and ActiveTablesPage with Close button correctly placed inside modal only.

issues: Missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility (console warning)

action_items: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility compliance (minor)
critical_code_review_comments: Close button correctly placed ONLY inside the details modal in ActiveTablesPage.js (lines 296-312)
Admin expiration check working correctly - expired admins get 403 on login
Restaurant deactivation correctly cascades to deactivate all users
All UI text is in Azerbaijani language as required
seed_data_creation: Created test restaurants and admins during backend testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-restaurant architecture fully tested. Owner can create restaurants and admins with expiration dates. Admin login works with admin1/admin123. Close button in ActiveTablesPage is correctly placed inside the details modal only. All UI is in Azerbaijani.

features_tested.owner_login: PASS - Owner login with owner/owner123 redirects to /owner
features_tested.owner_dashboard: PASS - Shows RestaurantsPage with restaurant list
features_tested.restaurant_crud: PASS - Create restaurant via POST /api/restaurants works
features_tested.restaurant_list_counts: PASS - Shows admin_count and staff_count for each restaurant
features_tested.admin_creation: PASS - Create admin with expiration date via POST /api/users works
features_tested.admin_login: PASS - Admin login with admin1/admin123 works
features_tested.admin_expiration: PASS - Expired admin gets 403 on login
features_tested.toggle_restaurant_status: PASS - PUT /api/restaurants/{id}/toggle-status works with cascade deactivation
features_tested.active_tables_close_button: PASS - Close button is ONLY inside the details modal, NOT on main card
features_tested.settings_page: PASS - Owner can view Settings page at /owner/settings

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/restaurants - PASS (returns list with admin_count, staff_count)

close_button_verification.condition: Only renders when selectedSession?.is_active is true
close_button_verification.main_card_buttons: Only 'Detallara Bax' (View Details) button on main session cards
